experience.title: M.S. Student Researcher
experience.company: Autonomous Control for Stochastic Systems Lab, KAIST (Daejeon, Korea)
experience.description: • Safety-critical generative AI: designing and certifying generative planners (flow matching, streaming flow, discrete diffusion) with formal safety guarantees (CBF/ECBF). Published at ICLR 2026 and workshops.

experience.title: Research Student
experience.company: Visual Media Lab, Kyung Hee University (Yongin, Korea)
experience.description:
• Built and evaluated MPEG FCM/FCVCM pipelines combining conventional codecs (VVC, HEVC) with neural compression; emphasized rate–accuracy trade-offs and reproducibility.
• 3 first-author domestic publications; 10 MPEG standardization contributions; 1 Korean patent.

experience.title: Research Intern

experience.description: Supported MPEG standardization by running validation experiments and analyzing performance data for FCM/FCVCM.

experience.title: Research Project
